description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the Docker image registry.gitlab.com/open-source-devex/containers/build:latest and defines a single stage called release. Add a release job that runs in the release stage, sets the GIT_REMOTE variable to git@gitlab.com:${CI_PROJECT_NAMESPACE}/${CI_PROJECT_NAME}, and uses the VERSION_FILE variable (version.txt). In its before_script it executes /opt/toolbox/users/setup-bot.sh, then /opt/toolbox/users/install-ssh-key.sh "${DEVEX_BOT_SSH_KEY}", and after the main script it runs /opt/toolbox/users/cleanup-bot.sh. The main script assigns VERSION=$(cat ${VERSION_FILE}), then runs git/tag-release.sh "v${VERSION}" and git/bump-version.sh "${VERSION}" "${VERSION_FILE}". The job is limited to the master branch and excluded when the commit message matches the regex ^Incremented version.*.
